'''vayaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seacraft|seacraft]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-y-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seacraft|seacraft]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vayaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væyæyæth|væyæyæth]] || [[word:væyæyæj|væyæyæj]] || [[word:væyæyæsh|væyæyæsh]] || [[word:væyæyæ|væyæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vayayayath|vayayayath]] || [[word:vayayayaj|vayayayaj]] || [[word:vayayayash|vayayayash]] || [[word:vayayaya|vayayaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vayayath|vayayath]] || [[word:vayayaj|vayayaj]] || [[word:vayayash|vayayash]] || [[word:vayaya|vayaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vayafyath|vayafyath]] || [[word:vayafyaj|vayafyaj]] || [[word:vayafyash|vayafyash]] || [[word:vayafyaf|vayafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vayayatha|vayayatha]] || [[word:vayayaja|vayayaja]] || [[word:vayayasha|vayayasha]] || [[word:vayayaka|vayayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vayayath|vayayath]] || [[word:vayayaj|vayayaj]] || [[word:vayayash|vayayash]] || [[word:vayaya|vayaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vayayathal|vayayathal]] || [[word:vayayajal|vayayajal]] || [[word:vayayashal|vayayashal]] || [[word:vayayakal|vayayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vayayathatha|vayayathatha]] || [[word:vayayajaja|vayayajaja]] || [[word:vayayashasha|vayayashasha]] || [[word:vayayaka|vayayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vayayathan|vayayathan]] || [[word:vayayajan|vayayajan]] || [[word:vayayashan|vayayashan]] || [[word:vayayakan|vayayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vayayathaoro|vayayathaoro]] || [[word:vayayajaoro|vayayajaoro]] || [[word:vayayashaoro|vayayashaoro]] || [[word:vayayakaoro|vayayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
